utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 6 items requested in the final format: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check if each is fully specified with all details expected by its label: 1) property: includes selected property with details and price (type, address, price, beds, baths, size, features, schools, viewing date) – fully specified. 2) financing: includes financing solution with terms (purchase price, down payment source/amount, mortgage amount, pre-approval status/validity, earnest money deposit) – adequately specified. 3) legal_services: provider, package, cost, services – fully specified with costs. 4) moving_services: provider, package, cost, services – fully specified with costs. 5) setup_services: utility and setup services – includes survey, utilities package with one-time cost, internet/cable with monthly cost, security with setup and monthly cost – sufficiently specified. 6) total_budget: complete cost breakdown – includes property cost, down payment, mortgage required, professional services with breakdown, utility setup costs, total initial investment, monthly ongoing costs with breakdown, timeline – fully specified. Therefore, all 6/6 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final property solution, the explicit selectable items that have corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings are: Property type 'Family House' (matches 'Family House' under purchase_properties), Legal package 'Premium Legal Package', Moving service 'Standard Moving', Property survey 'Full Structural Survey', and Utilities 'Premium Utilities Package' (matches 'Premium Utilities'). Security service with monthly fee CAD $60 matches 'Security Service' under additional_living_services.
